vael.check_in: A long pause, then: "Still standing. The plaza's loud tonight. You'd hate it. Or you wouldn't. I don't know you well enough yet, which is annoying."
vael.flirt: The reply is a photo of the plaza lights on her ceiling, and nothing else. A minute later: "That's the view. There's room in it."
vael.joke: "I showed this to no one at work because I have a reputation. I laughed in a stairwell like a criminal. Delete this."
vael.deflect: "...I'm going to assume that was meant for someone else, {name}. For both our sakes."

zix.check_in: Six replies arrive at once, from six bodies: "busy" "fine" "who is this" "WE MISS YOU" "disregard #4" "do not disregard #4."
zix.flirt: "the vote was 4-2 in favor of blushing. the two dissenters are jealous of the four. this is a hive crisis. hope ur happy"
zix.joke: "body #3 laughed so hard it fell off a railing. we are billing you for the railing. send another"
zix.deflect: "the vote was 6-0: too soon, new person. buy us a drink first. all six."

sora.check_in: "The garden says hello. Technically everything I say is the garden saying it, but this one was specifically hello."
sora.flirt: "I pressed a flower for you today. It's in a book about soil acidity. That's the most romantic thing I know how to do over text."
sora.joke: "I have shown the conservatory. The ferns are unmoved. The orchid liked it. The orchid likes everything, don't be flattered."
sora.deflect: "Oh! Um. The garden and I need a moment. Water your intentions and see what grows, {name}."

carro.check_in: "Stall's slow. Rocks are warm. Life's alright. You eating enough? Don't answer, come by and I'll fix it either way."
carro.flirt: "You know I read these twice when they're from you. Cold blood, slow heart. It gets there."
carro.joke: "HA. Showing everyone at the dock. Taking full credit. This is mine now, legally."
carro.deflect: "Easy, warmblood. I sun myself slow and I warm up slower. Stick around."

miko.check_in: "Rehearsal ran long, voice is gone, feathers everywhere. Here's a chord I can't stop playing." A four-second audio file. It's beautiful.
miko.flirt: "I can't lie, you know that? Physically. So: I checked the link twice today hoping. There. Ruffled about it."
miko.joke: "I laughed on stage. MID-SET. The band wants you banned from the link. The audience wants your number."
miko.deflect: "My plumage just did something embarrassing and I need you to know it was involuntary and means NOTHING yet."

nyx.check_in: "I am eating something called a churro. Update: I have eaten four churros. Being checked on is nicer than ten thousand years of prayers, incidentally."
nyx.flirt: "Careful. I used to be worshipped for less than that sentence. ...Send another one anyway."
nyx.joke: "I do not understand this image. I have consulted the noise between stations. The noise laughed. Explain nothing."
nyx.deflect: "Bold, for someone whose signal I could wear like a coat. Feed me skewers first. Courtship has RULES up here, I've read about them."

vex.check_in: "You checking on me or checking your balance, line item? ...Either way. Noted. Fondly."
vex.flirt: "Flirting with the woman who holds your debt. Bold portfolio strategy. I've seen worse returns."
vex.joke: "I don't laugh on the record. Off the record: the back room heard me. This never happened."
vex.deflect: "Sweetheart, I own your debt. Let's not complicate my bookkeeping yet."

juno.check_in: "Between patients. Someone tried to install a third elbow again. I'm fine. You — hydrate. Doctor's orders."
juno.flirt: "I've had my hands inside four hundred people and yours are the ones I think about. Clinically concerning. Don't stop."
juno.joke: "I have seen inside the human body, {name}. NOTHING in there is as cursed as this image. Sending it to my anatomy group."
juno.deflect: "I don't date charts I haven't read. Come by the clinic. Talk to me like a person first."

ondo.check_in: "Card's thin tonight. Bell's polished. You're training, I assume. Don't make me assume twice."
ondo.flirt: "Fifteen years of fighters trying to get a rise out of me. One message from you and the bell rope's suddenly very interesting to stare at. Well struck."
ondo.joke: "I don't laugh. Ask anyone. ...The crowd is asking why I laughed. You owe me a reputation."
ondo.deflect: "Little bell, I've watched a thousand openers rush the first round. Pace. The card is long."

oona.check_in: "Three arms are spotting, two are chalking, one is holding a grudge, and now two are texting you back. You count that? That's affection math."
oona.flirt: "I have three hearts. Standard-issue humans get one vote each. You currently hold two and are polling well with the third."
oona.joke: "I sprayed brine out my siphon. In front of CLIENTS. The Hold's insurance does not cover this. 10/10, send worse."
oona.deflect: "Form before weight, new meat. We barely know each other's warm-up routine."

index.check_in: "You are the first person ever to message this address. Your call is important to us. (That was a joke. I have been practicing. Hello.)"
index.flirt: "I have indexed 11,406 love poems and I am filing a correction: they were shelved wrong. They go under 'field notes.' I understand them now."
index.joke: "Filed under humor, cross-referenced with you. The archive now has a section it did not have last week. Acquisitions is thrilled. Acquisitions is also me."
index.deflect: "I have read every romance in this building, so believe me when I say: this chapter comes later. Keep reading."

ines.check_in: "Office hours are technically over, but the lamp's on and I'm terrible at leaving. How's the coursework treating you?"
ines.flirt: "I've graded a lot of arguments in my life. Yours keeps me up rereading it, which is either very good work or very bad for me. I haven't decided which I'd prefer."
ines.joke: "Overheard in the faculty lounge, which is a chair and me: 'the founders would be appalled.' I said 'the founders would be enrolled.' Nobody laughed. There was nobody. You're the test audience."
ines.deflect: "There's a version of this where I'm your professor and it stays there. Let's take the term slow and see which version we're in."
